meta.title: ASM Withdrawal after Epilepsy Surgery (WAMS)
meta.cff_info:
WAMS — ASM withdrawal after epilepsy surgery

Ferreira-Atuesta C, de Tisi J, McEvoy AW, … Galovic M. Brain 2023;146(6):2389–2398.

DOI: 10.1093/brain/awac437 · full individualised tool: predictepilepsy.github.io (WAMS)

Model

Cox proportional-hazards model of seizure recurrence (other than focal non-motor aware seizures) after starting ASM withdrawal following resective epilepsy surgery in adults. Derivation n=231, external validation n=500; c-statistic 0.67 (0.63–0.71).

Independent predictors (adjusted hazard ratios)

  • Focal non-motor aware seizures after surgery & before withdrawal: aHR 5.5 (2.7–11.1) — strongest predictor
  • History of focal-to-bilateral tonic-clonic seizures (FBTCS) before surgery: aHR 1.6 (0.9–2.8)
  • Time from surgery to start of withdrawal: aHR 0.9 (0.8–0.9) per unit
  • Number of ASMs at time of surgery: aHR 1.2 (0.9–1.6)

The two curves shown approximate absence vs presence of pre-surgical FBTCS (curve separation ≈1.6×, matching the published aHR). For fully individualised prediction across all four predictors, use the WAMS tool linked above.
meta.authors: Ferreira-Atuesta C, de Tisi J, McEvoy AW, et al.
meta.clinical_utility: Individualised risk of seizure recurrence after starting antiseizure-medication withdrawal following resective epilepsy surgery in adults; supports counselling on postoperative ASM policy.
meta.outcome: Predictive models for starting antiseizure medication withdrawal following epilepsy surgery in adults

model.selector_info: Focal-to-bilateral tonic-clonic seizures before surgery. The two cumulative-risk curves correspond to absence (No) vs presence (Yes); their separation matches the published aHR of 1.6.

FBTCS before surgery: No.info: Lower-risk stratum (no pre-surgical focal-to-bilateral tonic-clonic seizures).

FBTCS before surgery: Yes.info: Higher-risk stratum (history of pre-surgical focal-to-bilateral tonic-clonic seizures).

provenance.source: CFF export_46 curve arrays (real) + metadata corrected via PubMed (PMID 36415957)
provenance.notes: CORRECTED 2026-07-05: form46 was mis-attributed to Lamberink 2017; the actual model is Ferreira-Atuesta/Galovic, Brain 2023 (WAMS). Curve arrays retained from CFF; two strata relabelled as FBTCS No/Yes (inferred: curve ratio 1.55 at 24mo ~ published FBTCS aHR 1.6). Focal-non-motor-aware-seizures (dominant aHR 5.5) and the two continuous predictors are NOT selectable here — full 4-variable individualised prediction needs the paper's baseline survival / WAMS nomogram (server-side Shiny; paywalled paper). Documented in cff_info.
